title: Variable Convention
description: Convention for dynamic variables in DeepPsych JSON structures

convention.description: The naming convention used for dynamic variables

scope.description: This convention applies to Routine components and all nested structures

syntax.description: Dynamic variables are indicated by prefixing the variable name with $

field.description: The field where the variable is used

dynamicValue.description: Example of a dynamic value using $ prefix

default: For any field in Routine or below that needs to be dynamically changed, prefix the value with $
The $ prefix indicates that the value should be replaced with a variable at runtime
Static values (without $) remain constant across trials
Dynamic values (with $) are evaluated and substituted at runtime
This convention matches PsychoPy's variable substitution system
